title: Add exponential backoff retry and 429/5xx handling to HTTP client
description: Wrap httpx calls in retry: exponential backoff 2^n sec, max 5 retries, cap 5min. On 429 respect Retry-After else wait 10min. On 5xx wait 30s. Log all retries [PIZZINT].

title: Add dashboard-data tailing to scraper.py (60-min cadence, dedup on place_id+recorded_at)
description: Tail /api/dashboard-data every 60 min in scraper.py. INSERT OR IGNORE on (place_id, recorded_at). Log with [PIZZINT] prefix.

title: Add osint-feed tailing to scraper.py (15-min cadence, dedup on tweet.id)
description: Tail /api/osint-feed every 15 min in scraper.py. INSERT OR IGNORE on tweet id. Log with [PIZZINT] prefix.

title: Add dedup-safe INSERT (place_id+recorded_at, tweet.id) to all persistence functions
description: Add UNIQUE constraints + INSERT OR IGNORE dedup to place_popularity (place_id, recorded_at) and osint_tweets (id). Make persist functions idempotent.

title: Implement backfill.py: one-shot Phase 1 historical recovery (sparklines + polymarket timeseries)
description: backfill.py: call /api/dashboard-data once, extract sparkline_24h for all 9 places (INSERT OR IGNORE on place_id+recorded_at). Call /api/polymarket/timeseries for every token_id, persist all price history points.

title: Add scrape_log table: record every attempt, endpoint, status code, and error
description: Add scrape_log table (scraped_at, endpoint, status_code, success, error_msg, duration_ms). Depends on schema task.

title: Add place_popularity and osint_tweets tables to DuckLake schema
description: Create place_popularity table (place_id, name, current_popularity, recorded_at, data_freshness, is_spike, spike_magnitude) and osint_tweets table (id, text, url, timestamp, handle, is_alert) in DuckLake DDL.

title: Extend smoke test to cover new tables: place_popularity, osint_tweets, scrape_log
description: Extend test_smoke.py to cover place_popularity, osint_tweets, scrape_log: row counts, schema, dedup idempotency.
